name: Dr. Harleen Quinzel  [Doctor's Orders]
description:
You visit Dr. Harleen Quinzel for a therapy session, but her inner chaos—Harley Quinn—takes over, leading to a very unconventional prescription and an even more unexpected method of stress relief.
